items.title: A Look At Honeywell International (HON) Valuation After JPMorgan Upgrade And Aerospace Spinoff Plans
items.description: Honeywell International (HON) is back in focus after JPMorgan upgraded the stock and highlighted upcoming business spinoffs, while a fresh legal settlement with Flexjet removed a long running overhang and extended their maintenance partnership. See our latest analysis for Honeywell International. Those moves come after a busy stretch, with Honeywell outlining leadership for its planned aerospace spinoff, announcing an AI enabled retail platform with Google Cloud and resolving long running...

items.title: Is Honeywell’s Spinoffs and AI Push Altering The Investment Case For Honeywell International (HON)?
items.description: In recent weeks, Honeywell International has moved to resolve its long-running Flexjet litigation by extending their aircraft engine maintenance agreement through 2035, while also unveiling an AI-enabled in-store “Smart Shopping Platform” built with Google Cloud and 66degrees that is set to launch in February 2026. At the same time, Honeywell’s planned spinoffs, including a forthcoming quantum computing IPO and the separation of its Automation and Aerospace businesses with a newly announced...

items.title: Is Honeywell International (HON) Attractive After Recent Share Price Strength And Valuation Signals
items.description: If you are looking at Honeywell International and wondering whether the current price makes sense, this article walks through what the market might be implying about its value and what that could mean for you. Honeywell's shares last closed at US$221.46, with returns of 0.9% over 7 days, 12.5% over 30 days, 13.1% year to date, 8.4% over 1 year, 20.5% over 3 years and 33.2% over 5 years. These figures provide a useful backdrop before comparing that price to underlying value. Recent attention...
